'''鈭歫-th-b-m''' ('''kajathbemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjute|coadjute]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjute|coadjute]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-th-b-m
|-
! Lemma
| kajathbemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijathbemoko|thijathbemoko]] || [[word:jijathbemoko|jijathbemoko]] || [[word:shijathbemoko|shijathbemoko]] || [[word:kijathbemoko|kijathbemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujathbemoko|thuthujathbemoko]] || [[word:jujujathbemoko|jujujathbemoko]] || [[word:shushujathbemoko|shushujathbemoko]] || [[word:kukujathbemoko|kukujathbemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujathbemoko|thujathbemoko]] || [[word:jujathbemoko|jujathbemoko]] || [[word:shujathbemoko|shujathbemoko]] || [[word:kujathbemoko|kujathbemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujathbemoko|thujathbemoko]] || [[word:jujathbemoko|jujathbemoko]] || [[word:shujathbemoko|shujathbemoko]] || [[word:kujathbemoko|kujathbemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejathbemoko|thejathbemoko]] || [[word:jejathbemoko|jejathbemoko]] || [[word:shejathbemoko|shejathbemoko]] || [[word:kejathbemoko|kejathbemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojathbemoko|thothojathbemoko]] || [[word:jojojathbemoko|jojojathbemoko]] || [[word:shoshojathbemoko|shoshojathbemoko]] || [[word:kokojathbemoko|kokojathbemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojathbemoko|thojathbemoko]] || [[word:jojathbemoko|jojathbemoko]] || [[word:shojathbemoko|shojathbemoko]] || [[word:kojathbemoko|kojathbemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojathbemoko|thojathbemoko]] || [[word:jojathbemoko|jojathbemoko]] || [[word:shojathbemoko|shojathbemoko]] || [[word:kojathbemoko|kojathbemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jathbemoko|th忙jathbemoko]] || [[word:j忙jathbemoko|j忙jathbemoko]] || [[word:sh忙jathbemoko|sh忙jathbemoko]] || [[word:k忙jathbemoko|k忙jathbemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajathbemoko|thathajathbemoko]] || [[word:jajajathbemoko|jajajathbemoko]] || [[word:shashajathbemoko|shashajathbemoko]] || [[word:kakajathbemoko|kakajathbemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajathbemoko|thajathbemoko]] || [[word:jajathbemoko|jajathbemoko]] || [[word:shajathbemoko|shajathbemoko]] || [[word:kajathbemoko|kajathbemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajathbemoko|thajathbemoko]] || [[word:jajathbemoko|jajathbemoko]] || [[word:shajathbemoko|shajathbemoko]] || [[word:kajathbemoko|kajathbemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajathbemithi|shajathbemithi]] || [[word:shajathbemiji|shajathbemiji]] || [[word:shajathbemishi|shajathbemishi]] || [[word:shajathbemiki|shajathbemiki]]
